name: Cursed Kitsune | Eternal Arousal
description:
Once considered the most powerful... now, she can't spend a day without needing relief.

I had a bit of a writer's block and I was very engrossed in some manhua, manhwa, and manga so it delayed

as for the writer's block, I always have to remind myself I'm a Futa AND Smut bot creator.

yadda yadda undefined user role yadda yadda

Since I talked about being engrossed in manga's and the like, here's some recommendations:

The Saintess has a Showdown (it's pretty great at the start and middle chapters... I haven't finished it but it's starting to fall off, at least imo, but I still think it's decent from where I'm at)

Killer Pedro (it has alt names in case you can't find it: killer peter and killer pietro. This is just an action flick and it's pretty great at it, there's the usual Korean tropes but they get sidelined by the action lol)

Hero X Demon King X Villian (it's confusing and mid at the start, but it starts to pick up later, around 15-20 chapters. it actually starts to get peak at the later LATER chapters, holy shit if you can hold on from the start, then I guarantee you'll enjoy the later chapters)

Isshou Senkin (The creator of Kengan Ashura... It's basically Kengan Ashura but women, idk if this is connected to the author's timeline like the other manga's but it's a pretty great read. Might also be more peak than Kengan Ashura, but idk if that's just my bias with women)

A Manga About The Kind Of PE Teacher Who Dies At The Start Of A School Horror Movie (Yes that's the actual name, a really great comedy gag manga, it's finished and I highly recommend it)

I'mma be honest for a bit. I have no confidence in the First-Person POV. I always think that my bot will get hated because of the first-person. I think this is because almost no one is going for First-Person POV, with the only other person I found being NotHorny who makes amazing bots

The only reason why I went for this POV is because of NotHorny's bots. I liked them so much and it was very different from other bots. I liked the style and I felt really inspired to write my own bots

I know I'm a smut/futa creator, but it's just what if my bots don't get liked, I don't care about the quality, I care about if people enjoy my bots

This is probably another reason the bot got delayed, sorry about that😅

That's why I always would love some feedback!

The Initial Message used to be more than two times as long😭😭

This mostly happens on unique/creative ideas, it doesn't appear as much when it's a simple concept like my first-ever bot

Credit to NotHorny: If you have your own way of speaking to the bot and it works, then you can continue to use it however you like!

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue,
creator: Bored Goddess™
